summary: Frontend-only test of /examples redesign (compact teaser grid + side drawer + 24 examples + 9 categories). All requirements verified successfully — no issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: ExamplesPage.jsx is well-structured (~360 lines). Good separation: TeaserCard + Drawer + main component.
Body scroll lock correctly uses useEffect cleanup to reset overflow on unmount — prevents stuck-scroll bug.
Drawer uses AnimatePresence + spring physics — smooth UX.
Filter counts are computed inline on every render — fine for 24 items, but if list grows to 100+, consider useMemo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified: 24 teaser cards render with correct data-testid (example-{id}). All 9 filter buttons present with correct counts (All:24, Service:4, Hospitality:3, Digital:4, Retail:3, Health:5, Pro:3, Education:2, Community:2). Filter selections show correct subsets: hospitality=[cafe, restaurant-chain, boutique-hotel], pro=[accountant, estate-agent, law-firm], education=[driving-school, tutor], community=[wedding-planner, cycling-club]. Drawer opens on teaser click with data-testid example-drawer-{id}, overlay data-testid example-drawer-overlay present, drawer-close + drawer-calendly + drawer-whatsapp CTAs all present. Body scroll lock toggles correctly (document.body.style.overflow='hidden' when open, '' when closed). Drawer closes via X button AND via overlay click. No console errors. Mobile viewport (375px) has no horizontal overflow; drawer takes full width on mobile. examples-cta-calendly + examples-cta-whatsapp present at bottom.
verified_features: 24 teaser cards (cafe, dental, trades, coach, ecom, fitness, football, etsy, accountant, estate-agent, restaurant-chain, agency, gp-clinic, boutique-hotel, driving-school, tutor, law-firm, vet, landscaping, podcaster, removals, wedding-planner, salon, cycling-club)
Compact teaser style (icon + name + size + tagline + 'See breakdown' affordance)
Drawer opens with full breakdown content (before/integrated/AI/quote/results/CTAs)
Body scroll lock when drawer open
